quicksight.analysis.boxplotvisual.CfnAbo:
A box plot.

For more information, see [Using box plots](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/user/box-plots.html) in the *Amazon QuickSight User Guide*.

quicksight.analysis.boxplotvisual.Action.Description: The list of custom actions that are configured for a visual.

quicksight.analysis.boxplotvisual.ChartC.Description: The configuration settings of the visual.

quicksight.analysis.boxplotvisual.Column.Description: The column hierarchy that is used during drill-downs and drill-ups.

quicksight.analysis.boxplotvisual.Subtit.Description: The subtitle that is displayed on the visual.

quicksight.analysis.boxplotvisual.Title.Description: The title that is displayed on the visual.

quicksight.analysis.boxplotvisual.Visual.Description: The unique identifier of a visual. This identifier must be unique within the context of a dashboard, template, or analysis. Two dashboards, analyses, or templates can have visuals with the same identifiers..
